calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Seal Records Lodged Pursuant To Cal. Rule Ct. 2.551
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Seth Weisburst, Esq. of Winston & Strawn LLP, Tel. 415.591.1029, for petitioner and moving party;
Kevan Fornasero, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP, Tel. 415.344.7127, for non-party Twitter, Inc.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITIONER ANONYMOUS TEACHER'S Motion To Seal Records Lodged Pursuant To Cal. Rule Ct. 2.551 as follows: Granted. No opposition filed and for good cause shown. In addition, Mr. Weisburst provided the Court with an amended order that would also allow petitioner to file under seal the (Stipulated) Consent Order, attached to the petition as exhibit, when and if the Court approves and signs it. There was no objection from Miss Fornasero. After discussing the matter, the Court modified and signed the Amended Proposed Order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition (Discovery Matter)
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Seth Weisburst, Esq of Winston & Strawn (415-591-1029) for Anonymous Teacher Petitioner and moving party
Kevan Fornasero Esq of Perkins Coie (415-344-7127) for Twitter Non Party and Opposing party

Both parties stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem hearing the matter today. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: PETITIONER ANONYMOUS TEACHER's Hearing On Petition (Discovery Matter) is taken under submission. The Court will wait on the ruling of the Motion to seal to be heard in the Law and Motion Department 302 on July 29, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
